description: A lively watercolor depicting a bustling public park on a bright summer day. Dozens of figures in late-nineteenth-century dress promenade across an expanse of green lawn. Women carry red and white parasols, children in light dresses play in the foreground, and clusters of dark-suited men mingle among the crowd. A low building with a red roof is visible in the background, partly obscured by lush green trees. The painting is executed in loose, dappled brushstrokes with vivid greens, whites, and accents of red, capturing the sparkling effect of sunlight on a crowded scene.
